==⚠  Switch to EXCALIDRAW VIEW in the MORE OPTIONS menu of this document. ⚠== You can decompress Drawing data with the command palette: 'Decompress current Excalidraw file'. For more info check in plugin settings under 'Saving'


# Excalidraw Data

## Text Elements
Mental Model — Where Data Lives ^wod00000334l

Only IndexedDB is a source of truth. Everything else is seed, transport, or disposable. ^wod00000434l

1 · BUILD-TIME MARKDOWN ^wod00000634m

markdown/collections/**
markdown/feeds/**
markdown/efforts/**
markdown/canvas/**

import.meta.glob → in-memory arrays

Read-only. Seed & fallback only —
never a source of truth. ^wod00000734m

2 · INDEXEDDB — wodwiki-db v11 ^wod00000934m

SOURCE OF TRUTH for user content ^wod00000a34m

notes        identity (UUID), type, sourceId
segments   versioned content, PK [id, version]
results      workout runs — data.logs = full replay
analytics  derived trend rows (summary grain)
attachments HR / GPS blobs
page         calendar grouping (date)
tags, note_tags   labels
efforts      exercise definitions ^wod00000b34m

3 · LOCALSTORAGE (~19 keys) ^wod00000d34m

profile · onboarding · quests
theme · audio · debug · caches
legacy migration source

Disposable — wiping loses
NO user content. ^wod00000e34m

4 · IN-MEMORY (transient) ^wod00000g34m

pendingRuntimes — route handoff
WorkbenchSession (Zustand) —
  editor state + 5s autosave
CompositeEffortRegistry
sourceEditsRef — canvas edits

Lost on navigation / reload. ^wod00000h34m

seed on first visit ^wod00000j34m

hydrates ^wod00000l34m

Pages load IDB-first → fall back to bundled markdown → autosave back to IDB (line-idle debounce).
Every workout-result write funnels through one seam: playgroundRecorder → notePersistence.mutateNote. ^wod00000m34m

%%

